reviews.body: Quick to respond to queries whether by email or by telephone. Friendly and helpful when I called to ask for assistance.

I received my activation detals 2 days ago; I have used them this morning and told my user ID is suspended. Not a great start and now I have to waste time next week whena t work phoning you as your helpline is not open at weekends. Not user-friendly.

I have just applied to open an ISA and the process was straight forward. However, I feel the Form which needs to be completed to fund my account from another provider is not in my opinion user friendly. Rather than completing an extensive Form, I feel it would be a better customer service experience, if as part of the application process, there were far fewer fields for populate. Most other financial service providers, only request a sort code, account number, name of provider where the funds are to be requested from and whether this is to be released immediately or the end of a notice period/upon maturity.
The main reason I wanted to complete this review is the paience and attention I was given recently in opening an ISA - Jill was outstanding.
Wishing to keep savings in an ISA. I question about a nominated account, it should also state that account (or/plus  transfer to another ISA account) to keep funds tax free.
The new lady was very friendly and helpful.
Amazing helpful what ever deal thing I did. (Diana).
Very poor practice at this BS. They keep reducing savers rates ( twice in the last two  months) but not the mortgage interest. Their Standard Variable rate is completely arbitrary.
good speaking to Anya and very helpful, much better than digital conversations etc
Excellent Customer Service, both in branch and by phone to head office. A good selection of accounts but the interest rates are not especially competitive.
